name: Rolled Fondant
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over water and let it soften for 2 to 3 minutes, or until completely dissolved. You can place the container in a pan of hot water to help it dissolve.
2. Stir in corn syrup, glycerine, and shortening. Continue stirring until almost completely melted and remove from heat.
3. Place sugar in a large bowl and make a well in the center. Add the gelatin mixture and stir with a greased spoon until blended.
4. Mix with lightly greased hands and then knead vigorously in the bowl until most of the sugar is incorporated.
5. Turn onto a smooth surface and knead until smooth. If it seems too dry, add a few drops of water; if too sticky, knead in more sugar. The fondant should resemble a smooth, well-shaped stone. When dropped, it should spread very slightly but retain its shape.
6. Wrap fondant tightly with plastic wrap and place in an airtight container. It will firm slightly on standing.
JM.
My husband and son loved the cake! Enjoy!!!
